title: xiaoli-dong/taxflow pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

fastq_1.errorMessage: Field must be 'NA' or a valid FastQ file (.fq, .fastq, .gz).

fastq_2.errorMessage: Field must be 'NA' or a valid FastQ file (.fq, .fastq, .gz).

long_fastq.errorMessage: Field must be 'NA' or a valid FastQ file (.fq, .fastq, .gz).

fasta_contig.errorMessage: Field must be 'NA' or a valid Assembly file (.fa, .fna, .fasta, .gz).

errorMessage.anyOf: Each sample requires at least one of: fastq_1 (short reads) or fasta_contig (assembly).
